markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Negotiate and finalize the terms of a partnership agreement between Logic and growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement reached on a 6-month commitment instead of 12 months, addressing Steve's concerns about risk and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [GrowthX maintains their standard SOW structure but compromises on contract length](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [$9K/month pricing confirmed as the lowest tier for GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Both parties express optimism about long-term partnership potential](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

## Topics

### Contract Terms Negotiation

  - [Steve expressed strong concerns about the one-sided nature of the initial 12-month SOW with no termination clause](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Tyler explained GrowthX's standard practice of 12-month commitments, likening it to software contracts](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [GrowthX offered a compromise of a 6-month commitment instead of 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Steve accepted the 6-month term, though still considering it "quite aggressive"](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

### Risk and Accountability

  - [Steve emphasized the need for "levers" to hold GrowthX accountable if issues arise during execution](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Tyler highlighted GrowthX's reputation and incentives to make partnerships successful](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Discussion of potential risks: neglect due to larger clients, content not meeting expectations](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

### Partnership Structure

  - [8-week strategy sprint, with 7 weeks of publishing included](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Following strategy phase, transition to growth execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Total partnership valued at $9K/month, described as GrowthX's lowest tier pricing](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Trust and Relationship Building

  - [Both parties expressed desire for a long-term, successful partnership](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Steve assured he won't be a "pain-in-the- client" despite initial tough negotiations](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Tyler emphasized GrowthX's selectivity in clients and belief in Logic's potential](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Legal and Administrative Next Steps

  - [GrowthX's lawyer reviewing Steve's comments on the SOW](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Final language to be confirmed with Steve](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Tentative start date of the 8th to be locked in](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to finalize SOW review with their lawyer by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Confirm updated SOW language with Steve](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Lock in partnership start date (tentatively the 8th)](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Tyler to relay conversation details to Marcel (GrowthX CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Proceed with signing the 6-month agreement](https://fathom.video/share/CQQWDKUM1huUAE96JYusbdV4yHc5jPmn?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
